question: Will 40 or more unique traders participate in this market?
textDescription:
Resolution criteria

This market will resolve to "Yes" if 40 or more unique user accounts place at least one trade on this market before it closes. It will resolve to "No" if the total count of unique traders is 39 or fewer at the time of market closure.

The number of unique traders can be verified via the "Traders" tab on the market page. This market will resolve based on the data provided by the platform's public-facing trader count.
